story.intro: I started coding at 13 out of pure curiosity — by reverse-engineering a multiplayer Flash game to understand how it worked. I never stopped. Every company, every freelance project, and every technical challenge has been an excuse to learn something new.

timeline.title: First steps
timeline.description: At 13 I cloned a multiplayer Flash game using PHP and JavaScript — no tutorial, just someone else's code to dissect from scratch. That's where the obsession started.

timeline.title: High school graduation project
timeline.description: My project was a PHP landing page focused on performance and SEO. From the start, I cared about things working well — not just working.

timeline.title: SENA + first internship at Spira
timeline.description: Studied Technology in Analysis and Development at SENA (January 2014). Interned at Grupo Spira SAS (June–December 2015): PHP, jQuery, QA, functional testing and traceability matrices.

timeline.title: Grupo Spira — from JR to project lead
timeline.description: Returned as a JR and on my own initiative proposed adopting Angular internally. Built the MVP of Clínica de Ventas 360 with Angular 2, WebRTC and RecordRTC. Then led Mis Finanzas en Casa for Davivienda bank with Angular, PWA, push notifications and RSA security.

timeline.title: BCD Travel — leap to Fullstack
timeline.description: Joined as a Frontend developer and within 3 months built the foundation for a .NET platform migration. Frontend in Angular + C# Web API 2 as REST backend, applying JWT and RSA from day one.

timeline.title: Ormigga — deep dive into AWS
timeline.description: Built a marketplace with image processing using Canvas API and migrated the entire infrastructure from Digital Ocean to AWS: Route53, EC2 and S3. Also worked with Angular 7, Laravel, Ionic and Python Django.

timeline.title: Assist Consultores — enterprise clients
timeline.description: Worked with IBM and Bancolombia (Semilla group). Built REST APIs with Node.js for Betplay applying Clean Architecture and Feature Flags in high-demand environments.

timeline.title: SQA SA — AI applied to QA
timeline.description: Led the modernization of the Crowd Testing platform. Created a TensorFlow.js model that detects duplicate bugs and reduced reporting time from 4 days to 24 hours. Stack: Angular 12, Laravel 7, Jira and Bitbucket Pipelines.

timeline.title: Topaz SA — automation with AI Agent
timeline.description: Designed a visual deployment tool that reduced the required team from 8 people to 2. Evolved it with an AI Agent (AWS Lambda + Claude API + RAG) that generates complete flows from a single requirement. Also develops with Java Spring Boot, Angular, and AWS services like CloudWatch, API Gateway, Route53 and SQS. Leads a team of 4 developers.

timeline.title: Freelance projects
timeline.description: Developed for Colo Coffee and its partners: Pola del Pub, Sinners Beer and Cervecería Germania (WordPress, landing pages, campaigns). Vickycha's portfolio (architect) from Figma mockup with own design, build and SEO. And the migration of srg.com.co to AWS serverless.

highlights: Visual deployment tool: reduced team from 8 people to 2
AI Agent with RAG that generates complete flows from a requirement (US or Redmine Issue)
Automatic deployment error diagnosis with AI
Development with Java Spring Boot, Angular and AWS services: CloudWatch, API Gateway, Route53, SQS
Technical leadership of a 4-developer team
Stack: AWS Amplify, Lambda, S3, DynamoDB, CloudFormation, Claude API, Azure Pipelines, CI/CD
TensorFlow.js model for duplicate bug detection: from 4 days to 24 hours
Modernization of the Crowd Testing platform
Stack: Angular 12, Laravel 7, Material Design
Jira + Bitbucket Pipelines integration, CI/CD
Clients: IBM, Bancolombia (Semilla group)
REST APIs with Node.js for Betplay
Clean Architecture and Feature Flags
Stack: Angular, Node.js
Marketplace with image processing using Canvas API
Migration from Digital Ocean to AWS (Route53, EC2, S3)
Stack: Angular 7, Laravel, Ionic, Python Django
Joined as Frontend, built .NET platform foundation in 3 months
C# Web API 2 + Angular with JWT and RSA security
Clean architecture applied from day one
Internship Jun–Dec 2015: PHP, jQuery, QA, traceability matrices
Returned as JR in April 2016 on educational platforms with PHP, MySQL, jQuery
Proposed and implemented Angular internally on own initiative
MVP Clínica de Ventas 360: Angular 2, WebRTC, RecordRTC
Led Mis Finanzas en Casa for Davivienda: Angular, PWA, push notifications, RSA

projects.name: Deployment Tool + AI Agent
projects.description: Internal visual platform at Topaz that automates branches, cherry-picks, sync and error diagnosis with AI. Reduced team from 8 to 2 people. AI Agent generates complete flows from a single requirement.

projects.name: AI Bug Detector — SQA
projects.description: TensorFlow.js model for detecting duplicate bugs in the Crowd Testing platform. Reduced reporting time from 4 days to 24 hours.

projects.name: My Home Finances — Davivienda
projects.description: PWA app for retail banking at Banco Davivienda (Grupo Bolívar). Angular + push notifications + RSA security.

projects.name: Sales Clinic 360
projects.description: MVP with real-time video calls using WebRTC and RecordRTC. First Angular project at Spira SAS, proposed on own initiative.

projects.name: colo.com.co
projects.description: Full template built from Figma mockup for Colo Coffee.

projects.name: vickycha.cl
projects.description: Portfolio for architect Vicky Cha. Built from scratch from a Figma mockup — design, development and SEO 100% own work.

projects.name: srg.com.co
projects.description: Migration and modernization of traditional WHM infrastructure to AWS serverless with improvements in performance, scalability and cost.

projects.name: sinners.beer
projects.description: Support, design and functionality for a Colo Coffee partner.

projects.name: poladelpub.com
projects.description: Improvements, support and template adjustments in WordPress for a Colo Coffee partner.

projects.name: Cervecería Germania
projects.description: WordPress campaign landing pages, support and adjustments for a Colo Coffee partner.

about.bio: Senior Fullstack Developer and AI Innovator with over 8 years of professional experience (and 15 years coding). Specialized in Generative AI, cloud architectures with AWS, and leadership of high-performance technical teams. I started at 13 by reverse-engineering other people's code out of curiosity — and never stopped.
